title: Delivery fan-out and worker
description: When a post is created, query followers for the persona, deduplicate by shared_inbox_uri (fall back to inbox_uri), insert one delivery_queue row per unique inbox. Delivery worker: tokio task polling delivery_queue, HTTP POST with HTTP signatures, retry schedule (immediate, 1m, 5m, 30m, 2h, 8h, dead-letter after 7 attempts). 410 Gone removes follower. Per-domain circuit breaker: 10 consecutive failures triggers 1-hour pause (in-memory state). CLI: queue inspect, queue retry, queue stats.
close_reason: Delivery worker with retry/backoff/circuit-breaker, fan-out, queue CLI, inbox Follow/Accept/Undo all implemented
